MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on May 5, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of final report of petition re status of administration is also continued to that date.

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Miller for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it received no opposition. Mr. Miller stated that he has not heard from Ms. Harrington. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
